title: [VPlan] Run initial recipe simplification on VPlan0.
author: fhahn
description:
In some cases, LV gets simplifyable IR as input. Directly apply
simplifications on the initial VPlan0 to avoid vectorization in cases
where the loop body can be folded away.

Using the end-to-end pipeline, this is relatively rare, but when
reducing test cases, the reduction often ends up with cases with trivial
folds. Rejecting those will result in more robust & realistic test
cases.

As follow-up, I also plan to add initial dead recipe removal.

Depends on https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/176795.

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-i128:128-n32:64-S128"

define i32 @more_than_one_use(ptr %a, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %i = phi i64 [ %i.next, %for.body ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %r = phi i32 [ %tmp3, %for.body ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %i.next = add nuw nsw i64 %i, 1
  %cond = icmp slt i64 %i.next, %n
  %tmp0 = select i1 %cond, i64 %i.next, i64 0
  %tmp1 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %a, i64 %tmp0
  %tmp2 = load i32, ptr %tmp1, align 8
  %tmp3 = add i32 %r, %tmp2
  br i1 %cond, label %for.body, label %for.end

for.end:                                          ; preds = %for.body
  %tmp4 = phi i32 [ %tmp3, %for.body ]
  ret i32 %tmp4
}

target triple = "x86_64-apple-macosx10.8.0"

define i32 @cost_ashr_with_op_known_invariant_via_scev(i8 %a) {
entry:
  %cmp.i = icmp eq i16 0, 0
  %conv.i = sext i16 0 to i32
  %conv5.i = sext i8 %a to i32
  br label %loop.header

loop.header:                                      ; preds = %loop.latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i8 [ 100, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop.latch ]
  br i1 %cmp.i, label %then, label %else

then:                                             ; preds = %else, %loop.header
  %p.1 = phi i32 [ %rem.i, %else ], [ 0, %loop.header ]
  %shr.i = ashr i32 %conv5.i, %p.1
  %tobool6.not.i = icmp eq i32 %shr.i, 0
  %sext.i = shl i32 %p.1, 24
  %0 = ashr exact i32 %sext.i, 24
  %1 = select i1 %tobool6.not.i, i32 %0, i32 0
  br label %loop.latch

else:                                             ; preds = %loop.header
  %rem.i = urem i32 -1, %conv.i
  %cmp3.i = icmp sgt i32 %rem.i, 1
  br i1 %cmp3.i, label %loop.latch, label %then

loop.latch:                                       ; preds = %else, %then
  %p.2 = phi i32 [ 0, %else ], [ %1, %then ]
  %iv.next = add i8 %iv, -1
  %ec = icmp eq i8 %iv.next, 0
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop.header

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop.latch
  ret i32 %p.2
}

target triple = "x86_64-apple-macosx10.8.0"

define void @sdiv_by_zero(ptr noalias %src, ptr noalias %dst, i32 %d) #0 {
bb:
  br label %loop.header

loop.header:                                      ; preds = %loop.latch, %bb
  %iv = phi i64 [ %iv.next, %loop.latch ], [ 0, %bb ]
  %gep.src = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src, i64 %iv
  %l = load i32, ptr %gep.src, align 4
  %icmp = icmp eq i32 %l, 0
  br i1 %icmp, label %loop.latch, label %then

then:                                             ; preds = %loop.header
  %sdiv = sdiv i32 %l, 0
  br label %loop.latch

loop.latch:                                       ; preds = %then, %loop.header
  %merge = phi i32 [ %sdiv, %then ], [ 0, %loop.header ]
  %gep.dst = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %dst, i64 %iv
  store i32 %merge, ptr %gep.dst, align 4
  %iv.next = add i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp ult i64 %iv, 16
  br i1 %ec, label %loop.header, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop.latch
  ret void
}

attributes #0 = { "target-cpu"="znver3" }

target triple = "x86_64-apple-macosx10.8.0"

define i64 @test_predicated_udiv(i32 %d, i1 %c) #0 {
entry:
  br label %loop.header

loop.header:                                      ; preds = %loop.latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop.latch ]
  br i1 %c, label %loop.latch, label %then

then:                                             ; preds = %loop.header
  %call = tail call i32 @llvm.usub.sat.i32(i32 %iv, i32 1)
  %udiv = udiv i32 %call, %d
  %zext = zext i32 %udiv to i64
  br label %loop.latch

loop.latch:                                       ; preds = %then, %loop.header
  %merge = phi i64 [ %zext, %then ], [ 0, %loop.header ]
  %iv.next = add i32 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv, 1000
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop.header

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop.latch
  ret i64 %merge
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.usub.sat.i32(i32, i32) #1

attributes #0 = { "target-cpu"="znver3" }
attributes #1 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

target datalayout = "e-m:e-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"
target triple = "x86_64-pc-linux-gnu"

@c = external global [5 x i8]

define void @recipe_without_underlying_instr_lanes_used(i64 %n, ptr noalias %dst, ptr noalias %aux) {
entry:
  br label %loop.header

loop.header:                                      ; preds = %loop.latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %inc, %loop.latch ]
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %iv, %n
  br i1 %cmp, label %loop.latch, label %then

then:                                             ; preds = %loop.header
  %rem = srem i64 3, 0
  %add3 = add i64 %rem, -3
  %add5 = add i64 %iv, %add3
  %gep = getelementptr [5 x i8], ptr @c, i64 0, i64 %add5
  %l = load i8, ptr %gep, align 1
  br label %loop.latch

loop.latch:                                       ; preds = %then, %loop.header
  %sr = phi i8 [ 0, %loop.header ], [ %l, %then ]
  %p = phi i64 [ 0, %loop.header ], [ %rem, %then ]
  store i64 %p, ptr %aux, align 8
  %gep.dst = getelementptr i8, ptr %dst, i64 %iv
  store i8 %sr, ptr %gep.dst, align 4
  %inc = add i64 %iv, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %inc, 4
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %exit, label %loop.header

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop.latch
  ret void
}

target triple = "x86_64"

define void @pr141968(i1 %cond, i8 %v, ptr %p) {
entry:
  %zext.true = zext i1 true to i16
  %sext = sext i8 %v to i16
  br label %loop.header

loop.header:                                      ; preds = %loop.latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i8 [ %iv.next, %loop.latch ], [ 0, %entry ]
  br i1 %cond, label %loop.latch, label %cond.false

cond.false:                                       ; preds = %loop.header
  %sdiv = sdiv i16 %sext, %zext.true
  %sdiv.trunc = trunc i16 %sdiv to i8
  br label %loop.latch

loop.latch:                                       ; preds = %cond.false, %loop.header
  %ret = phi i8 [ %sdiv.trunc, %cond.false ], [ 0, %loop.header ]
  store i8 %ret, ptr %p, align 1
  %iv.next = add i8 %iv, 1
  %exitcond = icmp eq i8 %iv.next, 0
  br i1 %exitcond, label %exit, label %loop.header

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop.latch
  ret void
}

define i1 @reduction_with_const_or(ptr %A, i8 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %or.red = phi i1 [ false, %entry ], [ %or.next, %loop ]
  %iv = phi i8 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %iv.ext = zext i8 %iv to i64
  %gep = getelementptr inbounds i64, ptr %A, i64 %iv.ext
  store i64 %iv.ext, ptr %gep, align 8
  %or.next = or i1 %or.red, true
  %iv.next = add i8 %iv, 1
  %exitcond = icmp eq i8 %iv, %n
  br i1 %exitcond, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret i1 %or.next
}

define void @pr154045(ptr %p, i1 %c, i64 %x) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  br i1 %c, label %latch, label %else

else:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %rem = srem i64 0, %x
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %else, %loop
  %phi = phi i64 [ %rem, %else ], [ 0, %loop ]
  %phi.trunc = trunc i64 %phi to i32
  %shl = shl i32 %phi.trunc, 0
  store i32 %shl, ptr %p, align 4
  %iv.next = add i64 %iv, 1
  %exitcond = icmp eq i64 %iv, 1
  br i1 %exitcond, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret void
}

define void @neg_cond(ptr noalias %p, ptr noalias %q) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %p.gep = getelementptr i32, ptr %p, i32 %iv
  %x = load i32, ptr %p.gep, align 4
  %q.gep = getelementptr i32, ptr %q, i32 %iv
  %y = load i32, ptr %q.gep, align 4
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %x, 42
  %not = xor i1 %cmp, true
  %sel = select i1 %not, i32 42, i32 43
  store i32 %sel, ptr %p.gep, align 4
  %iv.next = add i32 %iv, 1
  %done = icmp eq i32 %iv.next, 1024
  br i1 %done, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret void
}
